children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If the Secretary designates a drug under as a qualified infectious disease product, then the Secretary shall give priority review to the first application submitted for approval for such drug under , or , that requires clinical data (other than bioavailability studies) to demonstrate safety or effectiveness.section 355f(d) of this titlesection 355(b) of this titlesection 262(a) of title 42

children.heading: Construction
children.label: b Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall prohibit the Secretary from giving priority review to a human drug application or efficacy supplement submitted for approval under that otherwise meets the criteria for the Secretary to grant priority review.section 355(b) of this title
